texto: When I think of music, I think of music in its totality, complete. From the lowest blues to the highest symphony, you know, so what I'd like to do is exemplify each style of as many periods as I can possibly do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Donny Hathaway: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “When I think of music, I think of music in its totality, complete. From the lowest blues to the h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, style, know pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de know e blues.

frase_original: When I think of music, I think of music in its totality, complete. From the lowest blues to the highest symphony, you know, so what I'd like to do is exemplify each style of as many periods as I can possibly do.
